sys_update_version.name: content_css_562f961997d32110d70ef207f053af16
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="content_css"><content_css action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><name>code_search</name><style>/* 2025-01-22 deactivated: The Intrux Code Search Application is its replacement */
/* THIS FILE WILL BE DELETED SOON */
/* OOTB min-width: 30px */
.progress-bar[aria-valuenow="1"], .progress-bar[aria-valuenow="2"] {
    min-width: 0px;
}

#progress-header #progress-text strong {
    color: #000000;
}

#progress-bar-container {
    display: -ms-flexbox;
    display: flex;
    -ms-flex-flow: row nowrap;
    flex-flow: row nowrap;
}

#progress-header #progress-text {
    float: left;
    min-width: 300px;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    overflow: hidden;
    padding-top: 3px;
    color: #455464;
}

.progress-bar {
    transition: none;
}

.search-pane {
	height: 100%;
	padding: 5px;
	overflow-y: auto;
}

#progress-header {
	display: block;
	background: #cfd4d8;
	padding: 10px;
	border-radius: 3px;
	margin-bottom: 10px;
	border: 1px solid #bec1c6;
	min-width: 350px;
	overflow: auto;
}

progress-header #progress-text {
	float: left;
	min-width: 300px;
	text-overflow: ellipsis;
	overflow: hidden;
	padding-top: 3px;
	color: #455464;
}

#progress-limit {
	float: right;
	display: -ms-flexbox;
	display: flex;
	-ms-flex-flow: row nowrap;
	flex-flow: row nowrap;
	-ms-flex-align: center;
	align-items: center;
	-ms-flex-pack: end;
	justify-content: flex-end;
	max-width: 410px;
	min-width: 400px;
}

#progress-limit .error {
	color: #FF0000;
}

#progress-container {
	float: right;
	display: -ms-flexbox;
	display: flex;
	-ms-flex-flow: row nowrap;
	flex-flow: row nowrap;
	-ms-flex-align: center;
	align-items: center;
	-ms-flex-pack: end;
	justify-content: flex-end;
	max-width: 410px;
	min-width: 400px;
}

#progress-container > div:first-child {
    font-weight: bold;
    -ms-flex: 1 1 200px;
    flex: 1 1 200px;
    text-align: right;
    padding-right: 10px;
}
#progress-bar-container .progress {
    -ms-flex: 1 1 100%;
    flex: 1 1 100%;
}
#progress-container .progress {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}
#progress-container > div:last-child {
    -ms-flex: 1 1 30px;
    flex: 1 1 30px;
    padding-left: 5px;
}
#progress-container #progress-bar-container {
	-ms-flex: 1 1 170px;
	flex: 1 1 170px;
}

#progress-container .icon-error-circle {
	color: #FFFFFF;
	font-size: 16px;
}

.search-pane #no-results {
	border: 1px dashed #828890;
	text-align: center;
	padding: 40px;
	font-size: 16px;
	background-color: #e7e9eb;
}

.search-pane ul {
	padding-left: 0;
}

.search-pane #search-results>li {
	display: block;
	margin-bottom: 3px;
}

.search-pane #search-results .result-line strong {
    background-color: #fff1b2;
    border: 1px solid #ffe366;
}

.search-pane #search-results .record-type-section .toggle-bar .toggle-trigger {
    color: #bec1c6;
}

.search-pane #search-results > li > .toggle-bar .toggle-trigger {
    color: #828890;
}

.nav-group .toggle-bar .toggle-trigger {
    -ms-flex: 0 0 auto;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.project-group.collapsed .record-type-section {
	display: none;
}

.record-type-group.collapsed .file-section {
	display: none;
}

.nav-group {
	padding-left: 0;
}

.search-pane #search-results>li>.toggle-bar {
	background-color: #e7e9eb;
	padding: 10px;
	border-radius: 3px;
	border: 1px solid #bec1c6;
}

.nav-group .toggle-bar {
	display: -ms-flexbox;
	display: flex;
	-ms-flex-flow: row nowrap;
	flex-flow: row nowrap;
	-ms-flex-pack: start;
	justify-content: flex-start;
	-ms-flex-align: center;
	align-items: center;
	padding: 2px 5px;
	font-weight: bold;
	overflow-y: auto;
	overflow-x: hidden;
	text-overflow: ellipsis;
	cursor: pointer;
	-webkit-user-select: none;
	-moz-user-select: none;
	-ms-user-select: none;
	user-select: none;
}

.search-pane #search-results>li>.toggle-bar .title {
	font-weight: normal;
}

.nav-group .toggle-bar .title {
	-ms-flex: 0 1 auto;
	flex: 0 1 auto;
}

.nav-group .title {
	display: inline-block;
	margin-left: 5px;
}

.search-pane #search-results .count {
	color: #828890;
	margin-left: 5px;
	font-weight: normal;
}

.search-pane #search-results>li>.toggle-bar .toggle-trigger {
	color: #828890;
}

.toggle-trigger {
	-ms-transform: rotate(90deg);
	transform: rotate(90deg);
	transition: transform 0.2s;
	float: left;
	font-size: 10px;
	margin-top: 0;
	margin-right: 5px;
	margin-left: 5px;
}

.collapsed .toggle-trigger {
	transform: rotate(0deg);
	margin-top: -2px;
}

.search-pane #search-results .record-type-section>li {
	display: inline;
}

.nav-group .nav-group {
	padding-left: 30px;
}

.search-pane #search-results .record-type-section .toggle-bar {
	background-color: #FFFFFF;
	padding: 10px 10px 10px 25px;
	border: 1px solid #cfd4d8;
	border-top: none;
	font-weight: normal;
}

.record-type-group .toggle-bar {
	padding-left: 30px;
}

.search-pane #search-results .file-section {
	padding: 10px 40px;
	width: 99%;
	margin: 0 auto;
	border-bottom: 1px solid #e7e9eb;
	background-color: #e7e9eb;
	box-shadow: inset 0 0 5px rgb(0 0 0 / 20%);
}

.search-pane #search-results .file-section li {
	list-style: none;
}

#search-form {
	padding: 10px;
}

#search-form #adv-search-term,
#search-form #search-scope
#search-form #global-search-group {
	margin-bottom: 10px;
}

#search-form .action-buttons {
	margin-top: 10px;
	display: -ms-flexbox;
	display: flex;
	-ms-flex-flow: row nowrap;
	flex-flow: row nowrap;
	-ms-flex-pack: justify;
	justify-content: space-between;
	-ms-flex-align: center;
	align-items: center;
}

#search-form .action-buttons button {
	-ms-flex: 3;
	flex: 3;
}

#search-form .action-buttons button:first-child {
	margin-right: 2px;
}

#search-form .action-buttons button:last-child {
	margin-left: 2px;
}

#search-form .row {
	padding: 5px 15px;
	display: -ms-flexbox;
	display: flex;
	-ms-flex-pack: justify;
	justify-content: space-between;
	-ms-flex-align: center;
	align-items: center;
	-ms-flex-flow: row wrap;
	flex-flow: row wrap;
}

/*
#search-form .row>div:first-child {
	-ms-flex: 3 3 auto;
	flex: 3 3 auto;
	margin-bottom: 5px;
}*/

#search-form .row #search-config-label {
	-ms-flex: 1;
	flex: 1;
}

#search-form .row #search-config{
	-ms-flex: 4;
	flex: 4;
}

#search-form .row #global-search-group {
	-ms-flex: 1;
	flex: 1;
}

#search-form .row #search-scope {
	-ms-flex: 4;
	flex: 4;
}

#search-form .row .action-buttons {
	-ms-flex: 1 1 auto;
	flex: 1 1 auto;
	text-align: right;
}</style><sys_class_name>content_css</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2023-06-07 10:17:23</sys_created_on><sys_id>562f961997d32110d70ef207f053af16</sys_id><sys_mod_count>6</sys_mod_count><sys_name>code_search</sys_name><sys_package display_value="DevOps+" source="x_424426_devops">0b41a31b97cf2110d70ef207f053afb0</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="DevOps+">0b41a31b97cf2110d70ef207f053afb0</sys_scope><sys_update_name>content_css_562f961997d32110d70ef207f053af16</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>markus.kraus@intrux.ch</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-01-22 08:36:33</sys_updated_on><type>local</type><url/></content_css></record_update>
